name: Terminal+ Airport Agent
description: AI-powered airport companion for Singapore Changi Airport. Provides amenity recommendations, flight context, and disruption alerts across T1, T2, T3, T4, and Jewel.

tools.name: get_airport_context
tools.description: Get terminal, gate, boarding time, and travel context for a flight at SIN.
tools.output: Airport context object with terminal, gate, urgency, inter-terminal travel info

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized amenity recommendations by vibe, terminal, and time constraints.
tools.output: Ranked list of amenities with scores, descriptions, and app links

tools.name: get_disruption_status
tools.description: Check flight for delays, gate changes, or cancellations with suggested response actions.
tools.output: Disruption details with severity, delay minutes, and suggested passenger actions

data_sources.amenities: Curated database of 372 verified SIN amenities

trust_signals.no_hallucination: Agent only returns amenities verified in database. Never fabricates.
trust_signals.verified_hours: Opening hours sourced from official airport data
trust_signals.real_time_disruption: Flight data refreshed via AeroDataBox API
trust_signals.transit_safety: Always warns about Jewel immigration requirements

beta_notes: Currently covers Singapore Changi Airport only. Expanding to additional airports Q3 2026.
